producer: QE 7.5 (conda) pw.x+ph.x electron_phonon='simple' + parse_elph_gen.py (H3S textbook-validated pipeline)
novelty: measured-Tc-zero (group-16 sweet-spot candidate; no published measured Tc) — DFT prediction Tc(μ*=0.10)=171-191K places H3O between H3S (203K measured) and H3Se (~113K DFT) by ω_log dominance
purpose: Group-16 lightest-X analog of H3S. Tests the hypothesis that lighter X drives ω_log up while keeping λ moderately high. Confirms phonon stability (Im-3m, no imaginary modes detected from ph.x parse).
system: H3O cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 O + 3 H = 4 atoms), celldm=4.89945 bohr (a≈2.593 Å), PBE PAW pslibrary

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 6x6x6 q (16 irreducible, weights [4,12,12,12,12,12,8,8,12,12,12,8,12,8,12,4]=160), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma 0.005-0.050 Ry (10 broadenings)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13

ALIGNN_per_cand.pathology_note: ALIGNN a2F prediction yields negative lambda (-0.42) → unphysical; AD-from-a2F path collapses. Direct jv_supercon_tc_alignn=4.3K bears no resemblance to DFT 171-191K. ML training-distribution wall (RTSC.md §9.7 / @D d7).

stability.phonon_imaginary_modes: 0 (Im-3m verified dynamically stable at this celldm)
stability.metastability_note: H3O at ambient is unstable (decomposes to H2O+H2). DFT prediction is for high-pressure stoichiometric Im-3m phase — synthesis pressure unmeasured.

honest_observations: Highest DFT Tc among 5 LANDED candidates — surpasses H3Se (98-128K), H3Te (72-76K), approaches H3S (175-195K) baseline.
Broad=0.015 upper-bound 191K monotone→171K at 0.030; converged value mid-sweep ~174-180K. ω_log ~1090-1111K is the highest in group-16.
ALIGNN negative-lambda pathology confirms RTSC.md @D d7 — first-principles physics required, not more ML.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1 (no RTSC absorbed=true) and Pattern 2 (no impossibility framing) both preserved.
citations: Drozdov et al. 2015 Nature 525:73 (H3S measured baseline 203K)
RTSC.md §9.7 (ALIGNN training-distribution wall) · §9.12 (H3S baseline) · §9.15 (H3X group sweep)
